long_prompt: In the center of a vibrant underwater scene, a scuba diver clad in a full-body black wetsuit, complete with a hood, mask, and long fins, floats horizontally. A silver air tank is strapped to their back. To the diver's left, a bright blue tang with a yellow tail swims by, and further above it is a vibrant orange fish. Below the diver, a dark grey spotted eagle ray with white spots covering its body glides towards the left. In the upper right corner, a large sea turtle with a patterned green and brown shell and yellowish skin swims towards the right. Several smaller fish are scattered around the turtle and diver. Below the turtle, a yellow fish with blue horizontal stripes swims left, and nearby, a small orange fish swims right. Positioned in the middle of the scene, just in front of the coral, are two clownfish; an orange and white striped clownfish is slightly above another orange and white striped clownfish. The entire bottom of the image is dominated by a vast and colorful coral reef, featuring bumpy formations in shades of orange, yellow, and red. The background is filled with deep blue water, with light filtering down from the surface, and numerous smaller, distant fish swimming throughout the scene.
